WHO assesses minimal risk of Nipah virus spreading outside India.

data.title: BTC drops to $82K with liquidations surging to $1.7B due to policy changes, as Trump reveals new Fed Chair.
data.description: Bitcoin's value plummeted to $82,134, marking a nine-month low due to changing policies and President Trump's recent announcement regarding the Fed Chair.

data.title: Vaxcyte priced public offering at $550M, selling 11M shares at $50/share. May add 1.65M more shares, total 12.65M shares.
data.description: Vaxcyte, Inc., a vaccine innovation company, disclosed on Jan. 29, 2026, that it priced an underwritten public offering of common stock. The company is offering 11,000,000 shares at $50.00 per share, aiming to raise $550 million in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. All the common stock shares in the offering will be from Vaxcyte. Additionally, the underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase up to 1,650,000 additional shares at the same price, before discounts and commissions.

data.title: AMS is making strategic leadership appointments and senior promotions to accelerate digital growth as media audiences shift across platforms.
data.description: In Pearl River, New York on January 29, 2026, Active Media Services, Inc. (AMS) disclosed its plans to adapt to the changing media landscape. The global media solutions company is redefining its strategies as audiences transition seamlessly between platforms. AMS shared its intention to revamp operations, investments, and leadership to align with evolving trends. This announcement signifies a significant shift in the company's approach to staying competitive in the market.

data.title: MCOMS introduces Google Cast on Samsung Smart Hotel TVs at world's tallest hotel in Dubai Marina, 377 meters high.
data.description: MCOMS has introduced its HOTstream Cast Embedded platform on the newest Samsung Smart Hotel TVs. This integrated solution has been implemented at Ciel Dubai Marina, Vignette Collection, which is considered the tallest hotel globally at 377 meters in the bustling Dubai Marina area. The launch took place in Dubai, UAE.

data.title: OPNsense® 26.1 'Witty Woodpecker' enhances security, visibility, and control for administrators in the latest release.
data.description: Deciso® is excited to unveil OPNsense® 26.1, affectionately named 'Witty Woodpecker.' This new Community Edition update enhances the security framework of OPNsense, enhancing network visibility and streamlining operations for administrators. 'Witty Woodpecker' builds upon the previous version, bringing further improvements to security and network management.

Indonesia’s top economic official reports that the President is keeping an eye on market trends.
Indonesia pledges to uphold economic credibility and stability, says Chief Economic Minister.

data.title: Hong Kong regulators unveil plan to strengthen sustainable finance by 2028. Expand taxonomy to cover 25 activities in six sectors.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) have introduced a comprehensive three-year plan to solidify Hong Kong's position as a leading sustainable finance hub in Asia. As part of this strategy, they aim to broaden the existing taxonomy to include 25 different economic activities spanning across six key sectors. This initiative signifies a significant step towards enhancing Hong Kong's capabilities in sustainable finance and promoting environmental, social, and governance (ESG) awareness in the region.
Indonesia aims to reform market structure to minimize conflicts of interest, says Chief Economic Minister.
Trump scheduled to participate in Friday’s policy meeting at 2 PM ET, says White House.

data.title: GeoPark acquires Frontera Energy's Colombian E&P assets to become a leading energy platform in Colombia and Argentina.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, GeoPark Limited, a prominent independent energy company with more than 20 years of experience in Latin America, has disclosed the signing of a definitive agreement with Frontera Energy Corporation. Under the agreement, GeoPark is set to acquire 100% ownership of Frontera Petroleum International Holdings B.V. (known as Frontera International), comprising solely of oil and gas exploration and production assets. GeoPark, listed on NYSE as GPRK, continues its strategic expansion in the region with this deal.

data.title: SanDisk Corp. stock up 22.38% to $660.00 after second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings, revenue up 31% to $3.03 billion.
data.description: SanDisk Corp.'s shares, listed on NASDAQ as SNDK, experienced a significant surge, rising by 22.38% to reach $660.00 in overnight trading on Thursday. This increase follows the release of their second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings report and an announcement about an extension of a joint venture. The stock closed at $539.30 during regular trading hours, marking a 2.21% increase. SanDisk reported a remarkable 31% growth in revenue for the second quarter of 2026, with total revenue reaching $3.03 billion. This demonstrates a substantial increase from $2.3 billion in the previous quarter and a 61% rise from $1.87 billion in the same period last year. The company also noted a significant uptick in non-GAAP diluted earnings per share, which stood at $6.20 compared to $1.22 in the prior quarter and $1.23 a year ago. Additionally, there was a noteworthy improvement in non-GAAP gross margin, which expanded to 51.1%, up by 21.2 percentage points from the first quarter of 2026. Within specific segments, the datacenter sector saw exceptional growth, posting a 76% increase. David Goeckeler, the CEO of the company, commented on these positive developments. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chainlink's oracle network is now being utilized by major financial institutions like UBS, J.P. Morgan, and U.S. Commerce Department, securing $95B.
data.description: In 2025, Chainlink (LINK) has become the leading on-chain finance infrastructure, seeing use by notable institutions including UBS, J.P. Morgan, and the U.S. Commerce Department for its oracle network services. This development highlights the growing prominence of LINK, showcasing its utility and reliability in the financial sector.

data.title: Rogers International Commodity Index (RICI®) Composition remains unchanged post annual meeting, reaffirming founding premise.
data.description: Singapore, January 30, 2026 - The annual meeting of the Rogers International Commodity Index (RICI®) Committee concluded with Jim Rogers and Beeland Interests, Inc. confirming that there will be no changes to the weights or components of the RICI. This decision solidifies the foundational principles of the index and ensures consistency in its composition.
